hero.heading: Nirvaan Wellness
hero.intro: A place to slow down, restore balance, and reconnect — in Providence, Seychelles.

manifesto.quote: Self care is not a luxury; it is a vital practice that supports balance, resilience, and overall well-being.

servicesSection.heading: The Virtues
servicesSection.intro: A curated collection of rituals, treatments and ceremonies — each named after the virtue it cultivates within.

philosophy.heading: Our Philosophy
paragraphs: Self care is not a luxury; it is a vital practice that supports balance, resilience, and overall well-being...

items.name: Aromatherapy
items.description: Deeply immersive massage. Slow, flowing movements combined with warm aromatic essential oils.

items.name: Back Massage
items.description: Skilled hands deliver rhythmic, targeted strokes across the back, releasing held tension.

items.name: Head, Neck & Back
items.description: Targets head, neck, and back tension using skilled touch and calming techniques.

items.name: Thai Stretching
items.description: Guided, practitioner-assisted Thai stretching weaving rhythmic movement, breath and targeted pressure.

serviceCategories.name: Virtues Ritual — Abundance
serviceCategories.subtitle: Head Spa
serviceCategories.note: Includes a complimentary quick blow dry.

items.name: Deep Cleansing
items.description: Meticulous deep cleansing session that combines gentle exfoliation and pore-clearing extractions.

items.name: Cocoon Self Love
items.description: Herbal steam followed by body exfoliation, hydrating wrap and cocooning swaddle.

items.name: Detox
items.description: Rejuvenating ritual combining full body scrub, nutrient-rich wrap and restorative massage.

items.name: Letting Glow
items.description: Immersive ritual combining invigorating body scrub, nourishing body wrap and soothing massage.

items.name: Heaven's Feet Flow
items.description: Personalised, hands-on foot (nails care included) and leg treatment, created in two parts.

items.name: Body Exfoliation
items.description: Full-body exfoliation gently lifts dead skin and roughness, revealing smoother, renewed, radiant skin.

items.name: Body Wrap
items.description: Serene full-body wrap envelops you in warm layers and hydrating serums.

items.name: Honey Pot
items.description: Personalised intimate care combining delicate technique and attentive service. Women only.

items.name: Peach Bum
items.description: Specialised comfort treatment for the posterior — attentive care and refined technique. Women only.

items.name: Honey Pot with Waxing
items.description: Expert honey pot and waxing service — meticulous intimate and body hair removal in one session.

items.name: Thai Traditional Herbal Steam
items.description: Traditional Thai herbal steam ritual — aromatic steam and attentive care for deep relaxation.

items.name: Bikini Line
items.description: Targeted hair removal of the bikini line area, removing unwanted hair and shaping.

items.name: Brazilian
items.description: Precision Brazilian waxing that removes hair from the front, back and bikini line.

items.name: Hollywood
items.description: Complete, integral bikini-area hair removal for clients seeking total intimate grooming.

policies.heading: Booking Policy
paragraphs: To provide a personalised and seamless experience, we welcome guests by appointment only.
All treatments must be booked in advance — walk-ins are not accepted.
Appointments can be requested via Message or WhatsApp, or online through our booking link. Please note that all bookings are subject to confirmation by our admin team.
We kindly ask guests to arrive 15 minutes prior to their scheduled appointment to allow time for check-in, consultation, and preparation for the treatment.
Thank you for your cooperation — we look forward to welcoming you for a relaxing experience.

policies.heading: Late Cancellations & No-Shows
paragraphs: To ensure the best experience for all our guests and therapists, we kindly ask you to respect our booking policy.
Late Cancellation: Appointments must be cancelled or rescheduled at least 48 hours prior to the scheduled time. Cancellations made within 48 hours will incur a 50% charge of the treatment price.
No-Show: Failure to attend an appointment without prior notice will result in a 100% charge of the treatment price.
Settlement of Fees: Any applicable cancellation or no-show fees must be fully settled before a new appointment can be booked.
We appreciate your understanding and cooperation, as this allows us to offer a seamless and respectful experience for all our guests.

policies.heading: Late Arrival Policy
paragraphs: To ensure a smooth and relaxing experience for all our guests, we kindly ask that you arrive on time for your appointment.
If you arrive late, your treatment time may be shortened to respect subsequent bookings — the full treatment price will still apply.
Insufficient Time: If the remaining time is not sufficient to perform the scheduled treatment, the appointment will be considered a late cancellation and the applicable 50% fee will apply.
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
